name: inmobiliaria-nz
description: App de administración de alquileres — reformulación a Laravel + React + Docker.

scripts.sh:db: docker compose exec mariadb mariadb -uinmo -p inmobiliaria
scripts.artisan: docker compose exec php-fpm php artisan
scripts.init:api: docker compose exec php-fpm php artisan key:generate
scripts.test:web: docker compose exec node-dev pnpm test
scripts.lint:web: docker compose exec node-dev pnpm lint
scripts.build:web: docker compose exec node-dev pnpm build
scripts.test:public: docker compose exec next-public pnpm test
scripts.lint:public: docker compose exec next-public pnpm lint
scripts.build:public: docker compose exec next-public pnpm build
